Testosterone Optimization Journey

Bryce's Optimization Success Story

Your testosterone levels have increased by 204% since starting treatment with Avail Wellness. The pellet insertion in January 2026 shows excellent absorption and sustained release - exactly the results we hoped to see for your specific case.

Complete Lab History

Feb 18, 2026

Access Medical Labs - Complete

Excellent response to pellet therapy. Testosterone optimized with balanced estradiol.

Total T: 853 ng/dl (238-1048)
Free T: 21.3 ng/dl (5.7-17.9)
Estradiol: 38 pg/mL (11.3-43.2)
Dec 17, 2025

Access Medical Labs - Complete

Low testosterone and estradiol. Excellent candidate for hormone optimization.

Total T: 281 ng/dl (238-1048)
Free T: 6.8 ng/dl (5.7-17.9)
Estradiol: <5 pg/mL (11.3-43.2)
Sep 24, 2025

Access Medical Labs - Complete

Baseline hormone assessment. Testosterone in normal range but suboptimal.

Total T: 586 ng/dl (280-1100)
Free T: 17.4 ng/dl (4.3-24.0)
Estradiol: 23.4 pg/mL (11.8-39.9)
Mar 3, 2025

LabCorp - Complete

Initial comprehensive panel. Low-normal testosterone, elevated cholesterol.

Total T: 305 ng/dl (264-916)
Free T: 7.3 pg/mL (8.7-25.1)

Understanding Your Results

Optimal vs. Lab Range

We use optimal reference ranges, not just lab normals. Your goal is to feel your best, not just "normal."

  • Lab Range: Based on all men tested (including unhealthy)
  • Optimal Range: Based on healthy, energetic men your age
  • Your Target: Top 25% of optimal range for symptom relief

Treatment Response

Your body has responded excellently to hormone optimization therapy:

  • Testosterone increased 204% since baseline
  • Free testosterone now in optimal range
  • Estradiol properly balanced (not too high/low)
  • Symptom scores improved across all categories
